notes: Best public-bundle checkpoint is still too weak for downstream VAE/diffusion success claims.
This is the 5/6-card multi-source teacher candidate; it also fails the quality gate.
Short Sequence target currently fails because non-timeout done rate is high.
Best existing jumps1 task-eval variant has tolerable body error but low reward, high joint error, and too many terminations.
Resource-adjusted jumps1 task eval has lower body error but still fails reward, joint error, and done-rate gates.
Reference/action baseline can be used for visualization only and does not unlock downstream teacher rollout collection.
This verifies that a source single-leg pose exists; it does not prove any policy, VAE, or diffusion controller learned it.
